svg.title: CarbonCoach — 5 Evaluation Parameters
svg.desc: Five pillars: Code Quality, Security, Efficiency, Testing, Accessibility — each with key requirements mapped below.
svg.text: Every code file must satisfy all 5 parameters — not just the primary one it maps to
Scoring: Code Quality 25% · Security 25% · Efficiency 20% · Testing 15% · Accessibility 15%
Minimum threshold: 70% per parameter to pass evaluation
